login_subtitle: Sign in to your WeDRIVE account to continue
signup_subtitle: Join WeDRIVE to experience smart car rentals
hero_desc: The most advanced car rental management system — powered by AI and built for the modern rental operator.
chatbot_input_ph: Ask me anything about car rentals...
chatbot_footer: AI responses are generated by Gemini · Always verify booking details
admin_subtitle: Here is what is happening with your cars today.
admin_ai_desc: Expected high demand for SUVs and Vans this upcoming weekend. Consider repositioning 8 units from low-demand zones.
cust_hero_sub: AI-powered recommendations · Best prices guaranteed · Instant booking
browse_banner: Sign in to unlock booking and AI recommendations
guest_hero_sub: Browse real car options, compare daily rates, and sign in when you are ready to reserve.
guest_cars_sub: Compare comfort, capacity, price, and AI notes before you sign in to book.
guest_steps_title: From browsing to keys in hand
guest_modal_title: Sign in to reserve this car
guest_modal_text: Create or sign in to your WeDRIVE account to continue with booking, payment, and confirmation.
how_sub: Get on the road in 3 simple steps
how_step1_desc: Sign up free and verify your driver's licence
how_step2_desc: Browse AI-recommended vehicles that suit your needs
how_step3_desc: Instant confirmation, pay securely, pick up and go
mkt_subtitle: Manage banners, promo codes, and seasonal pricing
cal_subtitle: Monitor bookings, events and seasonal pricing at a glance
how_page_sub: A calm step-by-step guide to registering, choosing the right car, paying securely, and collecting the keys with confidence.
how_step1_detail: Start by registering a WeDRIVE account for free. You will need to upload your ID and a valid driving license for security and insurance purposes.
how_step2_detail: Find the best fit based on budget, passenger count, route, and pickup location. Use our AI recommendation system to narrow the options faster.
how_step3_detail: Select your preferred dates and time, then complete payment through our secure online gateway to lock the booking.
how_step4_detail: Arrive at the pickup location on time. Our representative will verify the booking, walk you through the car condition, and hand over the keys.
how_panel_title: Know what happens before payment, verification, and pickup
how_panel_hint: You can browse first as a guest, then sign in only when you are ready to continue.
how_section_title: Everything the customer needs to do, in the right order
how_section_sub: Each stage explains what to prepare, what happens next, and why it matters before you take the car.
how_tip_title: A few details that keep the booking smooth
how_tip_sub: Prepare these early so payment, verification, and pickup move faster on the day.
how_tip1_desc: Keep the name on your account, ID, and driving licence consistent to avoid manual checks.
how_tip2_desc: Have your preferred card or FPX banking access ready before locking the booking.
how_tip3_desc: A short, on-time handover helps you inspect the car and start your trip without delay.
how_cta_title: Ready to start with the right car first?
how_cta_sub: Browse the guest showroom, compare options, then create your account when you are ready to continue with booking.
how_scrolly_phase1_copy: Open the guest showroom first. Compare cars, routes, prices, and Melaka trip ideas before you create an account.
how_scrolly_phase2_copy: Match the car to your budget, passenger count, driving route, and pickup plan so the choice feels easier and more accurate.
how_scrolly_phase3_copy: Your booking is only confirmed after payment. Sensitive car details stay hidden until the customer has completed the secure flow.
how_scrolly_phase4_copy: The customer arrives with verified documents, checks the car condition, receives the keys, and starts the trip with confidence.
how_3d_title: Inspect the real car before booking
how_3d_sub: Review the actual BMW exterior from every angle while sensitive rental details stay protected until payment is complete.
how_new_hero_sub: A clear rental guide for browsing cars, choosing the right match, paying safely, and collecting keys without confusion.
how_new_preview_note_copy: Guests inspect the real car visually, while plate and handover details stay hidden until payment is complete.
how_new_step1_copy: Compare photos, price, seats, fuel type, and trip fit before creating an account.
how_new_step2_copy: Use passenger count, route type, luggage, and comfort needs to narrow the car choice.
how_new_step3_copy: Complete payment first so the booking is locked and private handover details can be released safely.
how_new_step4_copy: Bring verified documents, inspect the car condition, receive the keys, and start the trip confidently.
how_new_journey_title: A clean route from browsing to pickup
how_new_journey_sub: The page now teaches what matters at each stage, without making the customer scroll through empty visual space.
how_new_lineup_title: Choose by trip style, not guesswork
how_new_lineup_note_copy: Economy for city errands, SUV for family luggage, and luxury for business or event arrivals.
how_new_car1_copy: Best for simple Melaka city drives, low fuel cost, easy parking, and quick daily errands.
how_new_car2_copy: Best for families, extra bags, smoother highway comfort, and day trips outside the city.
how_new_car3_copy: Best for executive travel, weddings, formal events, and customers who want a sharper arrival.
how_new_features_title: Clear for guests, private after payment
how_new_features_sub: Customers should know enough to choose confidently, but private car identifiers stay hidden until the booking is paid and confirmed.
how_new_guest_can_1: Car model, category, seats, fuel, and price
how_new_guest_can_2: Photos and 360 preview for visual confidence
how_new_after_payment_1: Plate number and exact car identity
how_new_feature_grid_sub: Every panel explains what helps customers decide, what protects the business, and what makes pickup smoother.
how_new_feature1_copy: Recommend cars from route type, passenger count, luggage needs, and comfort level.
how_new_feature2_copy: Guests can compare cars without seeing plate numbers or exact handover details.
how_new_feature3_copy: The booking becomes serious only after secure payment confirms the reservation.
how_new_feature4_copy: Customers arrive ready with documents, inspection steps, and key collection expectations.
how_new_quote: A strong rental flow should answer the customer's next question before they need to ask it.
how_new_quote_sub: That is the purpose of this page: remove confusion, protect sensitive details, and make every step feel calm.
how_new_cta_title: Ready to choose the right car?
how_new_cta_sub: Start with the guest showroom, compare the cars, and create an account only when you are ready to continue the booking.
melaka_sub: Explore attractions near the city centre so customers can choose a car that matches the vibe of their journey.
melaka_card_1_desc: A lively heritage lane filled with antique shops, cafes, street food, and a vibrant evening atmosphere in the heart of Melaka.
melaka_card_2_desc: Enjoy a relaxing cruise along the river while taking in murals, illuminated bridges, and the historic city from a different view.
melaka_card_3_desc: An iconic area for history, colonial buildings, museums, and photo stops around Melaka's UNESCO attractions.
melaka_card_4_desc: A laid-back beachside stop known for coconut shake, sunset views, and plenty of room for a short evening drive.
tutorial_title: Need a full guide to renting a car?
tutorial_sub: Open the dedicated tutorial page that explains each step, required documents, payment, pickup, and what customers should do after booking.
explore_sub: Plan your trip around Melaka's top attractions and find the perfect AI-recommended vehicle for your journey.
explore_plan_title: A polished route for first-time visitors in Melaka
explore_plan_stop_2: River Cruise for a slower evening view
explore_plan_stop_3: Klebang Beach for a soft sunset finish
explore_section_title: A more exclusive way to explore Melaka
explore_section_sub: Each stop is paired with the kind of car that suits the mood, pace, and roads around it.
explore_card_1_desc: A bustling heritage street famous for its antique shops, cafes, local street food, and vibrant weekend night market.
explore_card_2_desc: Take a relaxing 45-minute cruise along the river to see stunning murals, illuminated bridges, and historic kampungs.
explore_card_3_desc: The iconic Dutch Square featuring the historic Stadthuys, Christ Church, and various museums. Perfect for photos.
explore_card_4_desc: A perfect spot for a relaxing evening drive to watch the sunset, famous for its original Klebang Coconut Shake.
explore_card_5_desc: Explore the Porta de Santiago, one of the oldest surviving European architectural remains in Southeast Asia.
explore_card_6_desc: Enjoy a breathtaking 360-degree panoramic view of Melaka city from a height of 80 meters in this revolving gyro tower.
explore_footer_title: Ready to match the route with the right car?
explore_footer_sub: Open the guest showroom and pick a car that fits your Melaka plan before you sign in to continue.
